name: The Ghost, My Love
original_name: คุณผีที่รัก
overview: The story of Pii a young soul suffering from amnesia. Pii has a need need to seek the help of "Holy Water Students", people who sees ghosts; unfortunaltely his fear of the Holy Water group is not helping his cause. The formation of a bond between P and the group mean he must deal with Kamin, evil spirits trying to pump his soul to increase its own power. Fortunately, there is are Angels abe to to assist.

trailers.title: Official Teaser - คุณผีที่รัก เริ่มตอนแรก พุธที่ 20 สิงหาคมนี้
